purpose: Address the 8 ranked action items from the 2026-06-30 claude-inspection review of the CFD->1D closure pipeline via reusable scripts + documentation.
scope: Salt Jin paper subset (Salt 2/3/4 Jin primary; Salt 1 caveated). Kirst historical-only; perturbations separate sensitivity.

environment.node: LS6 compute node c318-008 (1 core interactive)
environment.openfoam: Foundation v12 via 'module load intel/24.1 impi/21.12 openfoam/12' reading v13 collated cases
environment.limitation: custom BC libRCWallBC.so on T not available; reconstruct only p,p_rgh,U,phi,rho

item_status.1_section_mean_pressure: workflow done; static p_rgh sound on straights; dynamic head blocked by velocity flux anomaly
item_status.3_closure_representation: done+run: form-loss-dominated f; dof<=1; Pr collinear
item_status.4_measured_geometry: partial: measured bore ~2.2x circle; proposed patch
item_status.7_segment_map: done+run: only upcomer ambiguous, heated_incline provisional

provenance_caveat: Reconstructable staged data is the parent-warmup window; mainline continuation field data is not in this workspace (item #6).
